docs.text:
:experiencecloud:
Build your commerce vision
Adobe provides developers with software, tools, and services to customize and extend Adobe Commerce to support multichannel, global commerce for B2B and B2C, and integrate with backend systems.
Take a product tour
Get Developer Docs
Get Merchant Docs
Get Operations Docs
Meet the newest Adobe Commerce offerings
Learn how Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service and Adobe Commerce Optimizer can help you deliver high-impact shopping experiences and reduce operational costs.
Commerce as a Cloud Service
Commerce Optimizer
Learn about the new AI developer tools
Use the AI developer tools to create new Adobe Developer App Builder applications or convert existing extensions to applications.
Learn more
Event-driven integrations
Build a personalized commerce powerhouse by adding Adobe Experience Cloud products to Adobe Commerce.
Customizable storefronts
Our new Edge Delivery Services, Commerce dropins, and Content blocks are now combined to create the fastest shops on the web.
API-first Commerce
Make innovation a constant with a secure, scalable, and extensible commerce platform.
Developer playground
An API playground for hands-on learning
View code samples
Extensibility use cases for Adobe Commerce
Access on-demand training
Training to take your career to the next level
Get Developer Certification
Grow your skills and get hired by partners
What's new with Adobe Commerce
See the latest new features and innovations
Get started integrating your systems with Adobe Commerce
Accelerate Adobe Commerce integrations with enterprise systems using the integration starter kit.
Get started

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive enterprise-grade e-commerce platform that provides extensive tools for B2B and B2C online storefront management.
llm_raw.notes: Adobe Commerce (formerly Magento) features a highly mature and extensive API ecosystem, though full access often requires an enterprise subscription.
